description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine and a prominent upper rail system, which supports a compact red dot sight for rapid target acquisition. The barrel is of standard length and capped with a simple thread protector, lacking any advanced muzzle device. The handguard is angular and includes a forward grip for improved stability during firing. The overall design is streamlined, with minimal external embellishments, emphasizing functionality and ease of use. The construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, typical of contemporary urban firearms.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and red dot sight. The design is sleek and functional, with a standard barrel and minimal external features.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the barrel end and the slim profile of the handguard and stock.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, red dot sight, and the overall tactical design.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the stock and the alignment of the upper receiver and sight.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same features as view 1, with the magazine, grip, and sight visible from the other side.
